title: Just Some Armor and Tools
description: Adds 4 armor and tool sets with some blocks
body:
Adds 4 armor sets all can use vanilla trims along with matching tool sets. The all the added armor also have set bonuses. As well as a 2 new blocks with 2 new slabs and stairs.

 

Adds

-Enderite a new post netherite ore found in the end that has an armor set that gives the bonus of resistance and night vision. Along with tools and a block, slabs and stairs all better then netherite.

-Emerald now has an armor set that gives the bonus of hero of the village and luck. Along with tools, slabs and stairs all equivelent to diamond.

-Prismarine now has an armor set that gives the bonus of dolphin grace and conduit power. Along with tools, tools being equivelent to diamond but the armor being slighly worse then diamond minus the set bonus.

-Copper now has an armor set that gives the bonus of mining speed. Along with tools, all equivelent to iron but with a bit less durability.

 

Copatibility
-JEI
